narrative.summary: NEW (Nov 2025). Beloved Tofino Korean spot expanded to Vancouver. Chef Julie Suh + son Dylan Kim. 35-day-aged galbi, gochujang fried chicken, truffle bulgogi. Currently buzzing — 4.7 rating. Perfect affordable-but-excellent lunch. Worth a deliberate stop for John’s design/architecture/art/food radar.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "LOVED our experience at Jeju. Our server, Noah, was great - polite, welcoming, and very knowledgeable. The food was so tasty. Our favorite was the Soondubu, which had a rich, seafood/shrimpy flavor that had the perfect kick to it. The Wagyu tartare and Sung’s style rib were our next favorites. And the octopus was so tender with a buttery smooth taste to it. Highly recommend the kimchi cucumber. The bulgogi was good as well. I would come back just for the Soondubu. 😋"

⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Jeju opened late last year in Mount Pleasant, with its original location in Tofino. Think modern, chef-driven Korean cuisine—refined flavours, elevated plating, and a menu that feels thoughtfully curated rather than traditional. Yes, it’s on the pricier side, but the execution makes it worth trying at least once. Every dish is beautifully presented and packed with bold, balanced flavors. Just a heads-up: no complimentary banchan here—side dishes are ordered separately. Tried the spicy banchan, including Napa cabbage kimchi with a deep, fermented kick and dubu spicy braised tofu, dense with lingering heat. Starters were solid: Wagyu tartare with sourdough, gochujang, and crisp Korean pear—rich, savoury, and refreshing all at once. KFC (Korean Fried Chicken) glazed in gochujang, paired with garlic aioli and pickled radish—crispy, sticky, and dangerously addictive. Japchae with chewy sweet potato noodles, seasonal vegetables, and tender pork loin. Main didn’t disappoint: Bulgogi-style sliced rib eye elevated with truffle, aged kimchi, and crispy bugak. Overall: bold flavours, modern presentation, and a refined take on Korean comfort food. Not your everyday Korean spot—but definitely one to check out if you’re in the mood for something elevated."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "So proud of myself for successfully getting an evening reservation — seriously, well done me!
This was honestly one of the best restaurants I’ve visited this year. Everything exceeded my expectations, but the galbi was on another level — absolutely incredible and unforgettable.
The atmosphere was warm and inviting, making the entire experience even more enjoyable. On top of that, the servers were exceptionally kind, attentive, and professional, which made us feel truly welcomed and well taken care of.
This is definitely a restaurant I want to return to again. I’m already hoping I’ll be lucky enough to secure another reservation next time.
Thank you for such a wonderful and memorable dining experience!"
